svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 182px; height: 150px; padding-top: 0px; margin-left: 350px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; width: 180px; height: 150px; overflow: hidden; color: #000000;

display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; width: 100%; height: 100%; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
div.p:
+ utilityType: Sting
+ endponit: String
+ status: Boolean
